title: Almost all my devices are not recongnized by  kernel-2.6.27, 2.6-28
description:
Latest working kernel version:kernel 2.6.24

Earliest failing kernel version: kernel 2.6.27

Distribution: Mandriva
Hardware Environment: Atlon AMD 1800+,

Software Environment: KDE

Problem Description: As said in the summary, with kernel 2-6-27 and 2-6-28 (thos ones are availables in mandriva repositories), all my devices are not recognized by the kernel. So, I have no printers, no internet, no webcam.....
With kernel 2-6-24, everything is fine. The bug is not due to patched  mandriva kernel since I used a pure linux version kernel.

Steps to reproduce:Just boot the kernel
